summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Avantra Chemicals iteration 3 - Gallery, Blog/Media Center, Video Testimonials, and Enhanced Product Editing. All 21 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified including new Gallery page, Media Center page, Blog Post detail page, Video Testimonials section on homepage, and Admin tabs for Gallery/Blog/Videos.
critical_code_review_comments: Gallery lightbox implementation is excellent with title and description overlay
Video testimonials support YouTube, Vimeo, and direct video URLs with proper embed handling
Blog post links array allows adding related links per post - good for SEO
Product form tabs (Basic, Composition, Details, Advantages) provide good UX for complex product data
seed_data_creation: Created test data during testing (gallery image, blog post, video testimonial) - cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working. Gallery CRUD with category filters (all, factory, team, events, products, general). Blog CRUD with links array [{title, url}], tags array, and slug-based routing. Video testimonials CRUD with YouTube/Vimeo/direct URL support - featured videos appear on homepage. Product form has 4 tabs: Basic (name, slug, category, image, tagline, overview, dosage), Composition (Component|Specification format), Details (how_it_works, growth_stages), Advantages.

gallery_page.details: Gallery page loads at /gallery with filter buttons (all, factory, team, events, products, general). Lightbox opens on image click showing title and description.

gallery_filters.details: All category filter buttons work correctly. API filters by category parameter.

media_center_page.details: Media Center page loads at /media showing blog post cards with featured image, date, title, excerpt, and tags.

blog_post_detail.details: Blog post detail page loads at /media/:slug with featured image hero, content, tags, related links, and back-to-media button.

video_testimonials_homepage.details: Video Testimonials section appears on homepage when featured videos exist. Shows 'Farmer Stories' badge, video cards with play button overlay, farmer name, location, and crop.

video_testimonial_modal.details: Clicking video card opens modal with embedded video (YouTube iframe working), title, farmer info, and quote.

admin_gallery_tab.details: Admin Gallery tab shows grid of images with Add Image button. Edit/Delete buttons appear on hover.

admin_blog_tab.details: Admin Blog tab shows table with Title, Status (Published/Draft), Date columns. Add Post button opens form with title, slug, featured_image, excerpt, content, links, tags, is_published fields.

admin_videos_tab.details: Admin Videos tab shows table with Title, Farmer, Crop, Featured columns. Add Video form has title, farmer_name, location, crop, video_url, thumbnail_url, quote, is_featured fields.

admin_product_form_tabs.details: Product form has 4 tabs: Basic (name, slug, category, image_url, tagline, overview, dosage, featured), Composition (Component|Specification textarea), Details (how_it_works, growth_stages textareas), Advantages (key advantages textarea).

navbar_logo.details: Avantra logo displays in navbar. Logo loaded from settings API.

navbar_gallery_media_links.details: Gallery and Media links present in navbar, navigating to /gallery and /media respectively.

admin_settings_tab.details: Settings tab still works with Logo URL, Hero Image, About Image, Phytocode Image, and Social Media Links.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/blog/{slug} - Get blog post by slug
POST /api/products - Create product with enhanced fields (composition, how_it_works, growth_stages, advantages)
